deep_dive.title: MoonSplat: Monocular Online Gaussian Splatting with Sim(3) Global Optimization
deep_dive.abstract: Online 3D reconstruction from monocular image sequences is a challenging and ongoing research topic. 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS), leveraging its high-quality real-time rendering capability, empowers online 3D reconstruction to represent dense scenes with enhanced expressiveness, and thus holds great promise for a wide range of applications such as robotics and AR/VR. However, existing online 3DGS methods still suffer from some key challenges: fragile camera pose estimation due to the lack of global optimization, and low optimization efficiency in large-scale or long-sequence scenarios. To address these issues, we propose a robust and efficient online voxelized 3DGS reconstruction framework integrated with global $\text{Sim}(3)$ optimization, which enables reliable camera tracking and efficient global loop closure for both camera poses and voxelized 3DGS. To accelerate the convergence of the voxelized 3DGS, we further introduce a color residual learning strategy, which not only boosts optimization speed but also enhances rendering quality. Extensive experiments on diverse indoor and outdoor datasets demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in both camera pose estimation accuracy and rendering quality, while retaining real-time efficiency. Additionally, we develop and deploy a real-world UAV-based active reconstruction system grounded on our proposed method, validating its robustness and generalizability for practical online 3D reconstruction tasks. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/TrickyGo/MoonSplat.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: online 3D reconstruction from monocular image sequences using 3D Gaussian Splatting
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 使用3D高斯泼溅从单目图像序列进行在线三维重建
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 使用3D高斯泼溅从单目图像序列进行在线三维重建
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 使用3D高斯泼溅从单目图像序列进行在线三维重建
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: MoonSplat proposes an online voxelized 3DGS framework with Sim(3) global optimization for robust and efficient 3D reconstruction from monocular video.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对在线三维重建中相机姿态估计脆弱、大规模场景优化效率低的问题，本文提出MoonSplat，一个基于3D高斯泼溅的在线重构框架。通过引入Sim(3)全局优化和体素化表示，MoonSplat在单目图像序列上实现了鲁棒且高效的三维重建，生成的稠密场景具有高表达力，适用于机器人和AR/VR应用。

deep_dive.title: Future Dynamic 3D Reconstruction: A 3D World Model with Disentangled Ego-Motion
deep_dive.abstract: Forecasting the evolution of dynamic environments is crucial for autonomous agents. While generative world models have recently achieved high photorealism in 2D video synthesis by mixing ego-motion and environmental dynamics within the image plane, they exhibit physical inconsistencies, such as morphing or vanishing objects, especially over long time horizons. In this paper, we propose FR3D, a world model that predicts a persistent 3D latent representation for future dynamic 3D reconstruction. Unlike prior works that treat the world as a sequence of image-based features, FR3D explicitly decouples the 3D evolution of the scene from the agent's trajectory, treating the inferred ego-motion as a latent proxy for action. This disentanglement resolves the ambiguities between self-motion and world-motion, ensuring geometric consistency into the future. Furthermore, we introduce a teacher-student distillation strategy that leverages the spatial "common sense" of off-the-shelf foundation models, leading to robust zero-shot generalization. Extensive experiments demonstrate FR3D's strong performance for future dynamic 3D reconstruction from monocular observations across multiple datasets, even 2 seconds into the future. Project page: https://fr3d-wm.github.io.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: future dynamic 3D reconstruction with disentangled ego-motion
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 具有解耦自我运动的未来动态3D重建
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 具有解耦自我运动的未来动态3D重建
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 具有解耦自我运动的未来动态3D重建
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: FR3D is a world model that predicts a persistent 3D latent representation for future dynamic 3D reconstruction by decoupling scene evolution from agent trajectory, achieving physically consistent long-horizon forecasting.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出FR3D，一种用于未来动态3D重建的世界模型。它将场景的3D演化与智能体轨迹解耦，学习持久的3D潜在表示。相比传统2D视频预测，该方法有效避免了物体变形或消失等物理不一致问题，在长时域预测中表现出显著优势。

deep_dive.title: JointEdit3D: Feed-Forward 3D Scene Editing in a Unified Latent Space
deep_dive.abstract: Existing 3D scene editing methods typically rely on per-scene optimization over explicit 3D representations or cascaded edit-and-reconstruct pipelines, resulting in high test-time cost, limited 3D awareness, and structural inconsistencies. To couple appearance synthesis and geometry prediction during editing, we build on a unified RGB-geometry reconstruction-generation latent space and adapt it to feed-forward 3D scene editing. The resulting framework, \textbf{JointEdit3D}, performs asymmetric latent inpainting by observing only a single edited RGB reference latent and generating the remaining RGB views and edited geometry latent under source-scene anchoring. JointEdit3D introduces a dedicated SceneAnchor Branch to inject source-scene structure without forcing direct copying, and adopts edit/background-aware losses to balance edited-region fidelity with unedited-content preservation. To address the lack of paired resources for standardized 3D scene editing evaluation, we introduce SceneEdit3D-15K, a dataset with 15K paired editing samples and renderer-provided 3D annotations, together with SceneEdit3D-Bench, a curated 100-sample benchmark. Experiments show that JointEdit3D improves edited-region quality and 3D structural completeness over prior baselines while maintaining competitive background preservation.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: 3D scene editing with novel view synthesis and geometry reconstruction
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 3D场景编辑结合新视角合成与几何重建
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 3D场景编辑结合新视角合成与几何重建
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 3D场景编辑结合新视角合成与几何重建
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: JointEdit3D performs feed-forward 3D scene editing by unifying RGB and geometry in a latent space, enabling asymmetric latent inpainting for novel view generation and geometry editing.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有3D场景编辑方法通常需要逐场景优化或级联编辑-重建流程，导致测试成本高且结构不一致。JointEdit3D构建了统一的RGB-几何重建生成潜在空间，通过非对称潜在修复仅观察单张编辑后的RGB参考潜在变量即可生成其余RGB视图和编辑后的几何潜在变量，实现了前馈式3D场景编辑。实验表明该方法在保持结构一致性的同时显著降低了编辑成本，为3D内容编辑提供了高效新范式。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有3D场景编辑方法通常需要逐场景优化或级联编辑-重建流程，导致测试成本高且结构不一致。JointEdit3D构建了统一的RGB-几何重建生成潜在空间，通过非对称潜在修复仅观察单张编辑后的RGB参考潜在变量即可生成其余RGB视图和编辑后的几何潜在变量，实现了前馈式3D场景编辑。实验表明该方法在保持结构一致性的同时显著降低了编辑成本，为3D内容编辑提供了高效新范式。

deep_dive.title: Geometric Consistency Protocol for Foundation Model Features in Multi-View Satellite Imagery
deep_dive.abstract: Standardized evaluation protocols are indispensable for robust benchmarking in remote sensing, particularly as foundation features are increasingly transferred across diverse sensors and complex imaging geometries. In satellite multi-view reconstruction, conventional evaluations relying on unconstrained 2D global matching are often misleading. The Rational Function Model (RFM) and its Rational Polynomial Coefficients (RPC) dictate a curved, height-dependent epipolar geometry that render flat 2D search spaces physically inconsistent. We propose a geometry-faithful and reproducible protocol tailored for the RPC framework. Our approach integrates an RPC-projected 3D consistency metric with a geometry-constrained dense matching proxy, specifically evaluating whether similarity responses remain localized and unique under physically plausible search manifolds. A pivotal finding of our joint reporting strategy is the decoupling of semantic agreement and geometric localization: high cross-view similarity at a projected 3D point does not guarantee reliable matchability in practical inference. Our benchmark demonstrates that incorporating geometric constraints is fundamental to the problem definition in satellite imagery. Furthermore, we show that state-of-the-art 2D backbones remain remarkably competitive against specialized 3D-aware models when subjected to this RPC-consistent evaluation.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: multi-view satellite imagery reconstruction evaluation protocol
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 多视图卫星图像重建评估协议
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 多视图卫星图像重建评估协议
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 多视图卫星图像重建评估协议
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a geometry-faithful evaluation protocol for satellite multi-view reconstruction using RPC-projected 3D consistency and constrained dense matching.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对卫星多视图重建中传统2D全局匹配评估协议误导性的问题，提出了基于有理函数模型（RFM）投影3D一致性度量和几何约束密集匹配的评估协议。该协议严格遵循RPC核线几何，避免了平面搜索空间的物理不一致，为卫星基础模型特征提供了一个标准化、可重复的基准。实验证明该协议能更可靠地评估多视图重建质量，对推动遥感三维重建技术的进步具有重要意义。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对卫星多视图重建中传统2D全局匹配评估协议误导性的问题，提出了基于有理函数模型（RFM）投影3D一致性度量和几何约束密集匹配的评估协议。该协议严格遵循RPC核线几何，避免了平面搜索空间的物理不一致，为卫星基础模型特征提供了一个标准化、可重复的基准。实验证明该协议能更可靠地评估多视图重建质量，对推动遥感三维重建技术的进步具有重要意义。

quick_skim.title: Neural Tree Reconstruction for the Open Forest Observatory
quick_skim.abstract: The Open Forest Observatory (OFO) is a collaboration across universities and other partners to make low-cost forest mapping accessible to ecologists, land managers, and the general public. The OFO is building both a database of geospatial forest data as well as open-source methods and tools for forest mapping by uncrewed aerial vehicle. Such data are useful for a variety of climate applications including prioritizing reforestation efforts, informing wildfire hazard reduction, and monitoring carbon sequestration. In the current iteration of the OFO's forest map database, 3D tree maps are created using classical structure-from-motion techniques. This approach is prone to artifacts, lacks detail, and has particular difficulty on the forest floor where the input data (overhead imagery) has limited visibility. These reconstruction errors can potentially propagate to the downstream scientific tasks (e.g. a wildfire simulation.) Advances in 3D reconstruction, including methods like Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF), produce higher quality results that are more robust to sparse views and support data-driven priors. We explore ways to incorporate NeRFs into the OFO dataset, outline future work to support even more state-of-the-art 3D vision models, and describe the importance of high-quality 3D reconstructions for forestry applications.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: 3D tree reconstruction from aerial images, using neural methods to improve upon classical SfM
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 从航拍图像进行树木三维重建，利用神经方法改进经典SfM
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 从航拍图像进行树木三维重建，利用神经方法改进经典SfM
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 从航拍图像进行树木三维重建，利用神经方法改进经典SfM
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Neural Tree Reconstruction proposes an open-source pipeline for forest mapping from aerial images, overcoming limitations of classical SfM with neural techniques.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对经典运动恢复结构（SfM）在森林三维重建中易出现伪影、细节缺乏的问题，本项目提出神经树木重建方法，利用无人机航拍图像构建低成本森林地图。该方法通过神经技术提升重建质量，避免了传统SfM的缺陷，为生态学、林业管理及气候变化应用提供了更精确的三维数据。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对经典运动恢复结构（SfM）在森林三维重建中易出现伪影、细节缺乏的问题，本项目提出神经树木重建方法，利用无人机航拍图像构建低成本森林地图。该方法通过神经技术提升重建质量，避免了传统SfM的缺陷，为生态学、林业管理及气候变化应用提供了更精确的三维数据。
